text: This car has excellent fuel efficiency.
The engine started making strange noises after 10,000 miles.
I love the sleek design and smooth ride.
The brakes failed unexpectedly during a short trip.
This vehicle has been reliable for over five years.
The transmission is sluggish and unresponsive.
Fantastic customer service and easy maintenance.
The dashboard lights keep flickering randomly.
Great value for the price and low insurance costs.
Battery died twice in the first month of ownership.
